a kerran awrat  

Monster
  • View
  • History
  • Media

Uploaded April 26th, 2014 by wiscookie
Updated April 28th, 2014

Category: EverQuest

Minimum Level: 12
Maximum Level: 14
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2019-07-27 14:27:14
Known Loot:
Bamboo Bokken
Collector's Kerran Doll
Kerran Doll

Known Habitats:
  Toxxulia Forest
Factions Decreased:
  Kerra Isle -3
Quests:
  Cazic Thule Disciple

Report a correction

Post Comment
Can anyone help me? =D
QuoteReply
# Dec 28 2002 at 3:01 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362247953
6 posts
hi, im a lvl 8 chanter, im looking for a good place to level besides qeynos guards, think this guy wouldnt whoop me? btw if you have any chars that can group send me a tell=)



Saynea, Enchanter of the eighth season,
Tribunal server
▲ Page top
Charmed Kittys
QuoteReply
# Jan 19 2002 at 12:53 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593965947036
2 posts
As a 15 enchanter I soloed the entrance pretty decently. It carried me from 15 to 17 in about 4 hours but that's with going afk a lot during medtime.

They seem to have some moderate magic resistance so it's good to use tashan at the beginning of a pull. What I did was charm one of the awrats at the entrance, debuff the second and let your charmed kill it. When it dies your charmed awrat will do some crazy victory run around the zone.. no idea why that happens but it doesn't train the zone on you thankfully. When it comes back root it and kill it. Then do the mamruks at the bridge. Rinse and repeat. XP is beautiful.

Some notes:
The awrats are casters with shammy spells.. they try to poison and drowsy you a lot. All of the cats there have sow also so if you think you might need to run stay close to zone. They do hit pretty hard when not debuffed and frequently.
▲ Page top
greenies
QuoteReply
# Dec 10 2001 at 12:14 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
hiya, im a druid and i just wanna know what level these things go green at? now there 12-14 (used to be 8-12. thanks for any information you can pass along, BTW there are 5 seperate pulls at the entrance! =}

-bluden
▲ Page top
dollies
QuoteReply
# Nov 19 2001 at 6:32 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
the dolls that these kitties drop are also required for the Cazac amulet quests (part 2). I thought you needed the hexed kerran doll dropped from Mitty (?), but my Troll shaman handed in one of these and got his amulet.
▲ Page top
Crazy stuff
QuoteReply
# Aug 19 2001 at 4:15 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
these kitty's are really hardcore i have a 20 necro and all the awrats and such in the front are green but still aggro me EZ for my pet and i to take 5 or so but i get trained so badly by a bunch of no EXP kitty's in this zone makes it not worth it tried it with a 19 monk with me he went in to pull since not KOS ran into something got EATEN ALIVE i was looking at his HP on the group screen it was like a very high speed DOT for masive damage i don't know if he ever got corpse back but i went invis and dragged it to zone for him be very careful solo in this zone if your KOS these are hardcore *****'s
▲ Page top
FishBone Neckless (01/05/2001)
QuoteReply
# Jan 05 2001 at 4:08 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Garellron my 17th level Wizard was soloing the 4 or 5 cats near the front and got a Fishbone Necklace as a dropped Item. I have been soloing these Putty cats for 3 levels now and this is the first time that I got that dropped Item. (From a awrat)
▲ Page top
RE: FishBone Neckless (01/05/2001)
QuoteReply
# May 11 2001 at 10:29 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The fishbone necklace is from a quest in Kerra Island. People do the quest for the Experience and faction, but the fishbone necklace they get every time is LORE, so insdead of destroying it, they put it on other Kerrans for people to loot later. Pretty Nice, it sells for 5pp.

Oh the quest, because I know sombody will ask...
The Wharf Rat in the building facing the second dock drops a sharp tooth. He's a bit higher level than the ones outside, easy blue to 19. Give the tooth to the Kerran standing on the second lock for the EXP, faction, and necklace. Can't remember the name, just Hail him first to make sure.
▲ Page top
RE: NOT 8-10
QuoteReply
# Nov 12 2000 at 6:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750139822
89 posts
They changed it between April and August. Think about it before you type.

sorry about the blank page.
Its to be turned into the qeynos theives guild, to the female guildmaster (dont remember
her name)you get a faction adjustment and 3gp.
on a side note when you give it to her she said i had an emerald hidden inside it.

RE: Kerran doll quest possible 2 quest

# Oct 13 2000 at 10:45 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
there are some children on kerra isle that ask if you have brought them a toy when you
hail them....the are along a wall near the kerran that will tell you ALL about Kerran history if you go through all the text near the docks....could be what its for?
▲ Page top
Best Xp
QuoteReply
# Aug 08 2000 at 4:20 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
these are best xp from 10-16 IF you have a group. the loot sux as they drop skin,fish, and milk, and couple of coppers. But if you kill the 2 at entrance and 2 mamluks at bridge and the single mamluk on the right next to hut...you will average a level a night for a group of 6. Trust me...my real life friends and group spent a month there leveling. We left to pursue better loots now.
▲ Page top
Faction
QuoteReply
# Jun 28 2000 at 1:35 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Are there any quest items that come from these creatures? Are they considered good... bad? I have killed a few with my 16th level Cleric and get a Your faction with KerraIsle has decreased. Is this something that will hurt me in other places besides this island? What do the merchants in Eruden think of it? if at all.

I also heard a rumor that these cats were banished from eruds crossing, is this true?
▲ Page top
They have Magic
QuoteReply
# Jun 28 2000 at 12:35 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I tried to hunt them with a 14th level Ranger, which two conned blue. They casted spell after spell of burn, frost, poison and weaken. They ate my lunch and barely zoned in time, just to die on the other side due to poison. Don't go there till you are level 18.

the peoblem is your a ranger.. if you were a useful class you could have taken them.. but your not, restart your character as something else.. and get over it.

NOT 8-10

These are NOT 8-10. I'm lvl 16 and hunting them right now and they're generally blue, OCCASIONALLY green and that's just in the front. I'd say they're 12-14.
